title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents a multi-agent system architecture that uses deterministic code and callbacks to skip LLM calls where unnecessary. The example system runs 1000 agents to plan marathon routes using the Spine & Sprout algorithm, bypassing the LLM entirely for route planning tasks that are NP-hard and deterministic.
